categories.mechanism: NOT Diskrimineringslagen — caregiver/parental status is not among the seven protected grounds in DiskrL 1 kap. 5 §, and indirect discrimination (1 kap. 4 § 2) is tethered exclusively to those grounds. The real mechanism is the missgynnandeförbud in Föräldraledighetslagen (1995:584) 16 §: employer may not disadvantage an employee for reasons connected to parental leave (incl. VAB) in pay, promotion, terms, work allocation, or dismissal. Reversed burden of proof (24 §), damages for loss and violation (22 §). Filing a free anmälan to DO requires no lawyer, but a damages claim runs through the labour-dispute track (23 §, 25 §): union first (statutory priority), DO second, own counsel last. Deadlines short — often 4 months, can be as little as 2 weeks.
categories.law: Föräldraledighetslagen (1995:584) 16, 16 a, 22, 23, 24, 25 §§; Diskrimineringslagen (2008:567) applies only if reframed as indirect sex discrimination

verification.self_executing: filing yes (free DO web form, no lawyer); remedy no (Arbetsdomstolen via union/DO/own counsel)

categories.mechanism: Free samarbetssamtal via kommunen first, then stämningsansökan to tingsrätten if no agreement; loser typically pays winner's legal costs; rättsskydd/rättshjälp may cover part of lawyer fees

categories.mechanism: Application for omvårdnadsbidrag directly to Försäkringskassan via e-tjänst (BankID): obtain läkarutlåtande (most clinics send digitally to FK), apply online (joint application possible, second parent co-signs within 14 days), FK investigates and books a review call. Four levels, 2026 amounts: 3 083 / 6 167 / 9 250 / 12 333 kr per month before tax. Child must have a funktionsnedsättning lasting ≥6 months requiring more care/supervision than same-age peers; payable until June of the year the child turns 19. Decision ~4 months; no money lost during processing (retroactive from decision). Also grants statutory right to reduce working hours by 25%. No lawyer, no fee. Appeal route: omprövning at FK, then förvaltningsrätten. Sibling benefit: merkostnadsersättning (SFB Kap. 50).
categories.law: Socialförsäkringsbalken (2010:110) 22 kap. (introduced by prop. 2017/18:190, in force 2019-01-01); Förordning (2018:1614) om merkostnadsersättning och omvårdnadsbidrag

verification.self_executing: yes — direct application to Försäkringskassan, free, no lawyer or court

categories.fable_task: generate_spec — application checklist: läkarutlåtande, e-tjänst steps, level descriptions, 25% work-reduction right

categories.mechanism: Patient-injury claim to Löf (regionernas patientförsäkring) for diagnosskada: Patientskadelagen 6 § 1 st. 3 p. explicitly lists 'felaktig diagnostisering' as a compensable category, judged by the 'erfaren specialist' standard (6 § 2 st.) on information available at the time — no hindsight reasoning. CRITICAL CAVEAT: the law compensates injury CAUSED BY the delay (disease progression, avoidable pain years, fertility loss, unnecessary surgery), not the delay itself — Löf: 'om förseningen medfört att du blivit sämre än om diagnosen ställts i rätt tid'. Causation standard: övervägande sannolikhet. File digitally with BankID; Löf obtains journals and investigates; free omprövning, then free advisory yttrande from Patientskadenämnden (request within 1 year of final decision), court as last resort. Time limit 10 years from injury (23 §). Small deductible (1/20 prisbasbelopp). ~1/3 of claims are compensated.
categories.law: Patientskadelagen (1996:799) 6 § 1 st. 3 p. och 2 st., 12–13 §§, 17 a §, 23 §

verification.self_executing: yes — free claim to Löf, no lawyer; but only delay-caused deterioration is compensable, not the delay as such

categories.fable_task: generate_spec — claim checklist with the deterioration-caused-by-delay caveat stated up front; do not promise compensation for waiting time alone
none — diagnosis only, do not invent a mechanism

categories.mechanism: Either spouse can apply alone to tingsrätten for a bodelningsförrättare (ÄktB 17 kap. 1 §). No official form — self-written application + personbevis (<3 months) + 900 kr fee (no new fee if divorce case already pending); e-service available. COST MECHANICS NOW RESOLVED: the förrättare (typically an advokat) bills hourly at private rates; spouses pay half each but are jointly and severally liable (17 kap. 7 §) — if the ex doesn't pay, the förrättare can pursue you for the whole fee. Rättshjälp does NOT cover this; the only state help is ersättningsgaranti (17 kap. 7 a §, form DV 1032): max 5 hours of förrättare work from public funds, only one spouse, only if that spouse's net share is under 100 000 kr; unappealable. Förrättare's decision can be challenged (klander) at tingsrätten within 4 weeks of service (17 kap. 8 §), else final. Framing: low barrier to trigger, potentially high cost to complete.

verification.self_executing: appointment step yes (one-page application, no lawyer); the förrättare process itself is costly, uncapped, and often ends in litigation via klander

categories.fable_task: generate_spec — application checklist plus honest cost warning (hourly fees, joint liability, 5-hour ersättningsgaranti cap)

categories.mechanism: Same mechanism as enforcement-tax — samarbetssamtal, then court
categories.fable_task: generate_spec — triage flow, not a document generator

categories.mechanism: Court modification of vårdnad/boende/umgänge under FB 6 kap. 5 § (custody, on talan of a parent; court weighs parents' ability to put the child's needs first and take joint responsibility — wording per 2021 reform), 14 a § (boende), 15 a § (umgänge). MANDATORY GATEWAY since 2022: informationssamtal at kommunens familjerätt before filing contested yrkanden (FB 6 kap. 17 c §; Lag 2021:530 — kommunen must hold the samtal within 4 weeks of request, issues samtalsintyg valid max 1 year, otherwise court MUST dismiss). Then stämningsansökan to tingsrätten where the child has hemvist: form DV 161 optional, attach personbevis 'vårdnadsärende' + samtalsintyg, 900 kr fee, BankID e-service. Each side normally bears own costs (FB 6 kap. 22 §); ombud optional but common; rättsskydd/rättshjälp may cover. Non-court alternative if parents agree: written avtal approved by socialnämnden (FB 6 kap. 6 §, 17 a §) — binding like a dom, free. IMPORTANT: barnets bästa decides, not parental fairness — de facto sole caregiving is an argument, not an automatic ground.
categories.law: Föräldrabalken (1949:381) 6 kap. 5, 6, 14 a, 15 a, 17, 17 a–c, 22 §§; Lag (2021:530) om informationssamtal

verification.self_executing: no — adversarial court process; free first steps exist (informationssamtal, samarbetssamtal, socialnämnd-approved avtal) and lawyer is formally optional

categories.fable_task: generate_spec — triage flow starting at free kommunen steps; never present court as first move
